title: Madoku Craft: Pets
description: Madoku Craft: Pets is a configurable Pet system. This system allows you to Equip spawn eggs into the player Inventory.
body:
Madoku Craft: Pets is a configurable Pet system.
This system allows you to Equip spawn eggs into the player Inventory.
You can customize most of these features in the CONFIG files.

## Dependencies:

- Fabric API
- Madoku Craft API

## Implementation:

**Pets:**

- Equipping a spawn egg allows you to have a Pet.
- Each Pet has an Ability that helps you.
- These Pets follow you around and teleport with you.
- Spiders love to dance around.

![Pets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c6db7b4960c273e63335b9d06e31c0e9d7eb74.gif)

**Hag:**

- A Hag is a new Entity that spawns in Witch Huts.
- Hags also spawn near the player, similar to Wandering Traders.
- You can buy spawn eggs from Hags.
- Hags are passive mobs unless attacked.

![Hag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a10847a6b5c419f0c4eacf4001c89be106ebffe1_0.webp)

**Inventory:**

- The player's inventory was modified to accept spawn eggs in a designated area.
- The UI was adjusted to fit the new slots.

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bb15b83e65d67238f206eb28cb190baf64781ba_0.webp)
